Current Job Opportunities

TNO is committed to employment equity initiatives. We encourage residents of the communities we serve, surrounding communities, and people who are racialized, Indigenous, people from the 2SLGBTQI+ community, people with disabilities and other equity seeking groups to apply. Should you require accommodation at any stage of the recruitment process please contact 416-467-0126 or recruitment@tno-toronto.org

TNO only posts jobs on our official website and communicates through official TNO email addresses. TNO may also post opportunities on Indeed, and applications are accepted only through these channels.

Opportunities for Volunteers and Placement Students

Volunteering is one of the most fulfilling ways to fully enjoy and take part in TNO – The Neighbourhood Organization. Whether you have one hour or more of time to donate, this is the right place for you. We also offer placement student opportunities for those looking to gain practical experience while contributing to the community. 

If you are interested in volunteering, please fill out our application form using the link below to apply. Please read the FAQ page prior to submitting your application. If you are interested in participating in our placement program please share your resume
